creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 157847
patch against latest pybugz port

Update devel/pybugz to 0.11.1.

Includes upstream support for newer Bugzilla (patch file removed).  Better error handling.  Display more fields in bugs.  Various other minor additions & output tidying.

python 2 support was dropped upstream (3.3+ prescribed).
